$meta.name: Path of Ambition — Item Catalog Schema
notes: data/items/items.json top level: $meta, item_traits, armor_types, masterwork_quality, abbreviations, kit_legends, slot_definitions, carry_rules, catalog.
Character inventory stores catalog_item_id + instance state only; item stats always resolve from the catalog at compute time (see character-schema.json).
Armor stat caps and defense math live in equipment-rules.json.

catalog_entry_fields.name: string
catalog_entry_fields.subcategory: string — finer grouping (e.g. medical, engineering for kits)
catalog_entry_fields.groups: string[] — armament proficiency tags (Simple/Martial/Finesse/Ranged); weapons only
catalog_entry_fields.traits: [{ name }] — item traits defined in item_traits
catalog_entry_fields.wound_bonus: number (optional) — armor adds to max Wounds
catalog_entry_fields.weight: number, in slot_weight units; stackable + stack_limit_per_weight_unit for bundles
catalog_entry_fields.is_template: boolean (optional) — baseline entry, not a purchasable item
